title: Date range query not exposed as MCP tool
evidence: src/soccer/query.clj:55 defines matches-by-date-range but mcp.clj does not include it in tools list
suggestion: Add a tool that exposes date range filtering capability

title: Top scorers not computed from match data
evidence: mcp.clj tools list includes biggest_wins but no top_scorers; TASK.md mentions top scorers as expected
suggestion: Implement top_scorers function to extract goal scorers from match data if available
